title: Kelanganne Kelunga Lyrics Vadacurry Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Kelanganne Kelunga
Singer(s): Gana Bala
Movie: Vadacurry
Music: Vivek Shiva & Mervin Solomon
Lyrics: Lalith Anand

Kelanganne Kelunga Kelunga
kettukitte irunga
oorasuthi voottanda roattaanga
ulla kadhainga.

Love matter-u, life matter-u
ellamey kandha story.
Tamil Naattula pala peru irukkaan
irukkaan ivana madhiri..

Onnu rendu moonu number irukku
cyber-ukku kooda value irukku.
Vazhaikaiyila veenaa tension edhukku.
natputhaaney nalla tonic-u

Suzhaludhu joraa boomi urunda
thiruppathi pona laddu urunda.
yezhaikku yeththa ellu urunda
kidaichaale podhum.

Raockettu mela, raja rani pola
sevvaayila plottu poda
paarkkudhu oru koottam.

Rocket pogum mela paathu
nippaan yezha.
diwalikku seattu poda
yengum oru koottam.

Ye apple phone-u android phone-u
ullavan pala peru.
ada post card-ayum pongal vazhkaiyum
paarkkala sila peru.

Weekend aanaa, ECR roadu
party enna bandha enna
ayyyo alaiyudhunga.

Meiyaalumey meiyaalumey
sandhosam edhuda edhuda.
podhumena ellaarum nenacha
kidakkum inbam thaanada..

Onnu rendu moonu number irukku
cyber-ukku kooda value irukku.
Vazhaikaiyila veenaa tension edhukku.
natputhaaney nalla tonic-u

Suzhaludhu joraa boomi urunda
thiruppathi pona laddu urunda.
yezhaikku yeththa ellu urunda
kidaichaale podhum.

AVM gemini, manasuthaana gavani
ponna paartha paiyanoda
kannum kadha sollum.
Baby albert devi
maha rani shanthi.
lifee oru theater thaanda
nenachaa padamaagum.

Ye kannum kannum pesikkitta
edhukku i-phone-u .
love pannum ponnu sirichaa podhum
adhuthaan ring tone-u.

Nam vazhkka kooda share-auto pola
nallathayum kettathayum share
pannudaa eppodhum..

Un vazhkka thaan un kaiyila
sonnaaru super star-u.
Urchaagamaa munneru namma life
romba superu..

Onnu rendu moonu number irukku
cyber-ukku kooda value irukku.
Vazhaikaiyila veenaa tension edhukku.
natputhaaney nalla tonic-u.

Suzhaludhu joraa boomi urunda
thiruppathi pona laddu urunda.
yezhaikku yeththa ellu urunda
kidaichaale podhum.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kelanganne Kelunga?

The song is an upbeat and energetic number that captures the lively essence of the movie Vadacurry.

Who composed the music for Kelanganne Kelunga?

The music for the song was composed by the duo Vivek – Mervin.

What role does the song play in the movie Vadacurry?

The song adds a vibrant and lively atmosphere to the film, enhancing its youthful and energetic vibe.

When was Kelanganne Kelunga released?

The song was released in the year 2014.

Who wrote the lyrics for Kelanganne Kelunga?

The lyrics were penned by Lalith Anand.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kelanganne Kelunga is a lively and energetic track from the movie Vadacurry, sung by Gaana Bala. The song's upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics by Lalith Anand make it a perfect fit for party and celebration settings. It reflects the youthful and vibrant spirit of the film, adding to the overall entertainment quotient. The music by Vivek and Mervin complements the song's lively nature, making it a memorable number in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kelanganne Kelunga from the movie Vadacurry is a vibrant and energetic track that captures the essence of modern Tamil cinema. Sung by the dynamic Gaana Bala, this song is a perfect blend of Vivek and Mervin's catchy beats and Lalith Anand's witty lyrics. Dive into the lively world of Vadacurry with this peppy number that promises to get you moving!
stanzaMeanings: Listen carefully, keep listening, keep going around the town, the roads and the stories inside.
Love matters, life matters, everything is like a story. In Tamil Nadu, many people are like him.
There are one, two, three numbers, even cyber has value. Why unnecessary tension in life? Friendship is a good tonic.
The earth spins fast, like the round laddu from Tirupati. For the poor, even a small sesame ball is enough.
On the rocket, like a king and queen, a group is plotting with red lips.
The rocket goes up, the poor watch. A group is everywhere setting off fireworks for Diwali.
Some have Apple phones, Android phones. Some haven't even seen a postcard or a simple life.
When it's the weekend, on ECR road, there's a party. What's the fuss? Oh, they're wandering around.
Really, really, what is happiness? If everyone thinks it's enough, then that's joy.
There are one, two, three numbers, even cyber has value. Why unnecessary tension in life? Friendship is a good tonic.
The earth spins fast, like the round laddu from Tirupati. For the poor, even a small sesame ball is enough.
AVM, Gemini, if you look at a girl, the boy's eyes tell a story. Baby Albert, Devi, Maha Rani, Shanthi. Life is like a theater, if you think, it becomes a movie.
Why need an iPhone when eyes can talk? If the girl you love smiles, that's the ringtone.
Our life is like a shared auto, sharing both good and bad always.
Your life is in your hands, said the superstar. Move forward enthusiastically, our life is super.
There are one, two, three numbers, even cyber has value. Why unnecessary tension in life? Friendship is a good tonic.
The earth spins fast, like the round laddu from Tirupati. For the poor, even a small sesame ball is enough.
